desc: A three-axis long-term memory plugin for AstrBot, covering episodic memory, social relationships, and narrative summaries with persistent cross-platform storage and a rich WebUI.

metadata.desc: A three-axis long-term memory plugin for AstrBot, covering episodic memory, social relationships, and narrative summaries with persistent cross-platform storage and a rich WebUI.

general.hint: Plugin language and LLM provider settings

general.language.hint: Sets the language used by backend-generated content such as summary headings and Markdown file headers. The WebUI language is configured separately in the interface.

language.hint: Sets the language used by backend-generated content such as summary headings and Markdown file headers. The WebUI language is configured separately in the interface.

general.llm_provider.description: LLM Provider for Summaries and Extraction
general.llm_provider.hint: Select the LLM provider used for background tasks such as event extraction, persona synthesis, and narrative summaries. Leave empty to use AstrBot default provider.

llm_provider.description: LLM Provider for Summaries and Extraction
llm_provider.hint: Select the LLM provider used for background tasks such as event extraction, persona synthesis, and narrative summaries. Leave empty to use AstrBot default provider.

general.llm_concurrency.hint: Maximum number of background LLM requests this plugin may run at once, such as event extraction, persona synthesis, and summary generation. Recommended: 1-3 to avoid API rate limits.

llm_concurrency.hint: Maximum number of background LLM requests this plugin may run at once, such as event extraction, persona synthesis, and summary generation. Recommended: 1-3 to avoid API rate limits.

webui.hint: Enable browser access to the Moirai three-axis memory panel

webui.webui_enabled.hint: When enabled, the Moirai memory panel is available in the browser, including event flow, graph, and summaries.

webui_enabled.hint: When enabled, the Moirai memory panel is available in the browser, including event flow, graph, and summaries.

webui.webui_port.hint: Local port used by the WebUI HTTP service. Default is 2655. Restart required after changing.

webui_port.hint: Local port used by the WebUI HTTP service. Default is 2655. Restart required after changing.

webui.webui_auth_enabled.hint: When enabled, the first visit requires setting an admin password. When disabled, anyone can access the WebUI; only recommended for local deployments without public exposure.

webui_auth_enabled.hint: When enabled, the first visit requires setting an admin password. When disabled, anyone can access the WebUI; only recommended for local deployments without public exposure.

webui.webui_session_hours.hint: Number of idle hours after login before the session expires automatically.

webui_session_hours.hint: Number of idle hours after login before the session expires automatically.

webui.webui_sudo_minutes.hint: Number of minutes before Sudo mode exits automatically. Write operations require entering the password again after timeout.

webui_sudo_minutes.hint: Number of minutes before Sudo mode exits automatically. Write operations require entering the password again after timeout.

webui.webui_password.hint: Manually configure the WebUI access password. If empty, a random access token is generated on startup and printed to the console.

webui_password.hint: Manually configure the WebUI access password. If empty, a random access token is generated on startup and printed to the console.

embedding.hint: Embedding model settings required for semantic retrieval

embedding.embedding_enabled.hint: Requires a local Sentence Transformer model, about 100 MB. When disabled, retrieval falls back to BM25 keyword search only.

embedding_enabled.hint: Requires a local Sentence Transformer model, about 100 MB. When disabled, retrieval falls back to BM25 keyword search only.

embedding.embedding_provider.hint: Choose whether to use a local model or remote API.

embedding_provider.hint: Choose whether to use a local model or remote API.

embedding.embedding_model.hint: HuggingFace model ID for local mode, or API model name for API mode.

embedding_model.hint: HuggingFace model ID for local mode, or API model name for API mode.

embedding.embedding_api_url.hint: Only used when the provider is API, for example https://api.openai.com/v1/embeddings.

embedding_api_url.hint: Only used when the provider is API, for example https://api.openai.com/v1/embeddings.

embedding.embedding_api_key.hint: Only used when the provider is API.

embedding_api_key.hint: Only used when the provider is API.

embedding.embedding_batch_size.hint: Number of messages to read from the database per batch. Larger values increase peak memory usage. Default: 50.

embedding_batch_size.hint: Number of messages to read from the database per batch. Larger values increase peak memory usage. Default: 50.

embedding.embedding_request_batch_size.hint: Number of texts included in a single Embedding API request. Default: 16.

embedding_request_batch_size.hint: Number of texts included in a single Embedding API request. Default: 16.

embedding.embedding_concurrency.hint: Maximum internal concurrency for batch embedding requests. Default: 1.

embedding_concurrency.hint: Maximum internal concurrency for batch embedding requests. Default: 1.

embedding.embedding_batch_interval_ms.hint: Delay between reading consecutive batches from the database. Default: 5000 (5s).

embedding_batch_interval_ms.hint: Delay between reading consecutive batches from the database. Default: 5000 (5s).

embedding.embedding_request_interval_ms.hint: Wait time between individual Embedding API sub-requests. Default: 5000 (5s).

embedding_request_interval_ms.hint: Wait time between individual Embedding API sub-requests. Default: 5000 (5s).

embedding.embedding_failure_tolerance_ra.hint: Maximum allowable ratio of failed messages within a single batch (0.0-1.0). Default: 0.02.

embedding_failure_tolerance_ratio.hint: Maximum allowable ratio of failed messages within a single batch (0.0-1.0). Default: 0.02.

embedding.embedding_retry_max.hint: Maximum number of attempts when an embedding request fails.

embedding_retry_max.hint: Maximum number of attempts when an embedding request fails.

embedding.embedding_retry_delay_ms.hint: Base exponential backoff wait time after an embedding batch failure. Default: 30000 (30s).

embedding_retry_delay_ms.hint: Base exponential backoff wait time after an embedding batch failure. Default: 30000 (30s).

retrieval.hint: Controls how memories are retrieved from the database and injected into prompts.

retrieval.retrieval_top_k.hint: Number of the most relevant memory items to return per retrieval. Select 0 to automatically skip recall and injection.

retrieval_top_k.hint: Number of the most relevant memory items to return per retrieval. Select 0 to automatically skip recall and injection.

retrieval.retrieval_active_top_k.hint: Maximum number of memory items allowed to be returned when the agent actively calls the long-term memory retrieval tool.

retrieval_active_top_k.hint: Maximum number of memory items allowed to be returned when the agent actively calls the long-term memory retrieval tool.

retrieval.retrieval_token_budget.hint: When over budget, memories are greedily truncated by importance, freshness, and relevance.

retrieval_token_budget.hint: When over budget, memories are greedily truncated by importance, freshness, and relevance.

retrieval.retrieval_salience_weight.hint: Proportion of memory salience in the hybrid scoring. Larger values prioritize memories with higher salience.

retrieval_salience_weight.hint: Proportion of memory salience in the hybrid scoring. Larger values prioritize memories with higher salience.

retrieval.retrieval_rrf_k.hint: Sets the RRF parameter k for the retrieval fusion strategy. Smaller values emphasize top-ranked results, while larger values lead to smoother fusion. Default: 60.

retrieval_rrf_k.hint: Sets the RRF parameter k for the retrieval fusion strategy. Smaller values emphasize top-ranked results, while larger values lead to smoother fusion. Default: 60.

retrieval.injection_position.hint: Select where to inject the retrieved memory content. 'fake_tool_call' simulates a tool call returning the memory.

injection_position.hint: Select where to inject the retrieved memory content. 'fake_tool_call' simulates a tool call returning the memory.

retrieval.injection_auto_clear.hint: When enabled, old injected memory snippets in the historical context will be automatically deleted before injecting new ones to prevent context bloat.

injection_auto_clear.hint: When enabled, old injected memory snippets in the historical context will be automatically deleted before injecting new ones to prevent context bloat.

retrieval.memory_isolation_enabled.description: Enable Memory Isolation by Group ID
retrieval.memory_isolation_enabled.hint: When enabled, private chats and group chats retrieve memories independently. When disabled, retrieval is global across group IDs.

memory_isolation_enabled.description: Enable Memory Isolation by Group ID
memory_isolation_enabled.hint: When enabled, private chats and group chats retrieve memories independently. When disabled, retrieval is global across group IDs.

retrieval.retrieval_weighted_random.hint: When enabled, uses Softmax sampling instead of deterministic Top-K truncation, making memory recall more natural by occasionally recalling lower-scored events.

retrieval_weighted_random.hint: When enabled, uses Softmax sampling instead of deterministic Top-K truncation, making memory recall more natural by occasionally recalling lower-scored events.

retrieval.retrieval_sampling_temperature.hint: Only effective in weighted random mode. 1.0 is standard; lower values approach deterministic ranking, while higher values increase randomness.

retrieval_sampling_temperature.hint: Only effective in weighted random mode. 1.0 is standard; lower values approach deterministic ranking, while higher values increase randomness.

vcm.hint: Virtual Context Manager settings for active session cache and context window size.

vcm.vcm_enabled.hint: Enables the virtual context management state machine: Focused, Recall, Eviction, and Drift.

vcm_enabled.hint: Enables the virtual context management state machine: Focused, Recall, Eviction, and Drift.

vcm.context_max_sessions.hint: Maximum number of active sessions (MessageWindow) kept in memory.

context_max_sessions.hint: Maximum number of active sessions (MessageWindow) kept in memory.

vcm.context_session_idle_seconds.hint: A session is automatically removed from memory after this many seconds without new messages.

context_session_idle_seconds.hint: A session is automatically removed from memory after this many seconds without new messages.

vcm.context_window_size.hint: Maximum number of historical messages passed to the LLM for event summarization.

context_window_size.hint: Maximum number of historical messages passed to the LLM for event summarization.

vcm.context_max_history_messages.hint: Maximum number of historical messages to keep in the database for each session. Oldest messages will be pruned in batches when exceeded. Recommended: 500-2000.

context_max_history_messages.hint: Maximum number of historical messages to keep in the database for each session. Oldest messages will be pruned in batches when exceeded. Recommended: 500-2000.

vcm.context_cleanup_batch_size.hint: Minimum number of old summarized messages to attempt to delete when the history limit is exceeded.

context_cleanup_batch_size.hint: Minimum number of old summarized messages to attempt to delete when the history limit is exceeded.

soul.hint: Dynamic emotion state that changes with conversation and can be injected into the system prompt to influence reply style.

soul.soul_enabled.hint: When enabled, RecallDepth, ImpressionDepth, ExpressionDesire, and Creativity update dynamically during conversation and are injected into the system prompt to influence reply style.

soul_enabled.hint: When enabled, RecallDepth, ImpressionDepth, ExpressionDesire, and Creativity update dynamically during conversation and are injected into the system prompt to influence reply style.

soul.soul_decay_rate.hint: The ratio by which each emotion dimension decays toward zero after every conversation turn. 0.1 means 10% decay per turn.

soul_decay_rate.hint: The ratio by which each emotion dimension decays toward zero after every conversation turn. 0.1 means 10% decay per turn.

soul.soul_recall_depth_init.hint: Initial value for RecallDepth, from -20 to +20. 0 is neutral.

soul_recall_depth_init.hint: Initial value for RecallDepth, from -20 to +20. 0 is neutral.

soul.soul_impression_depth_init.hint: Initial value for ImpressionDepth, from -20 to +20. 0 is neutral.

soul_impression_depth_init.hint: Initial value for ImpressionDepth, from -20 to +20. 0 is neutral.

soul.soul_expression_desire_init.hint: Initial value for ExpressionDesire, from -20 to +20. 0 is neutral.

soul_expression_desire_init.hint: Initial value for ExpressionDesire, from -20 to +20. 0 is neutral.

soul.soul_creativity_init.hint: Initial value for Creativity, from -20 to +20. 0 is neutral.

soul_creativity_init.hint: Initial value for Creativity, from -20 to +20. 0 is neutral.

cleanup.hint: Periodically cleans old memories whose importance decays below the threshold to control database size.

cleanup.memory_cleanup_enabled.hint: When enabled, periodically cleans memories whose importance is below the threshold.

memory_cleanup_enabled.hint: When enabled, periodically cleans memories whose importance is below the threshold.

cleanup.memory_cleanup_threshold.hint: Unlocked memories with salience below this value are automatically cleaned.

memory_cleanup_threshold.hint: Unlocked memories with salience below this value are automatically cleaned.

cleanup.memory_cleanup_interval_days.hint: How many days between automatic cleanup runs.

memory_cleanup_interval_days.hint: How many days between automatic cleanup runs.

cleanup.memory_cleanup_retention_days.hint: Number of days archived events are retained before permanent deletion.

memory_cleanup_retention_days.hint: Number of days archived events are retained before permanent deletion.

summaries.hint: Periodically generate daily narrative summaries for active groups.

summaries.summary_enabled.hint: When enabled, periodically generates daily summary Markdown files for active groups.

summary_enabled.hint: When enabled, periodically generates daily summary Markdown files for active groups.

summaries.summary_interval_hours.hint: How many hours between narrative summary generations for each active group.

summary_interval_hours.hint: How many hours between narrative summary generations for each active group.

summaries.summary_word_limit.hint: Upper bound for generated daily summary text, between 200 and 500 Chinese characters or equivalent length.

summary_word_limit.hint: Upper bound for generated daily summary text, between 200 and 500 Chinese characters or equivalent length.

summaries.summary_mood_source.hint: Determines how the [Mood Dynamics] section in daily summaries is generated. Database mode aggregates real social model data.

summary_mood_source.hint: Determines how the [Mood Dynamics] section in daily summaries is generated. Database mode aggregates real social model data.

boundary.hint: Controls how conversations are split into events, as well as extraction strategy and tag system settings.

boundary.persona_influenced_summary.description: Use Current Persona When Summarizing Events
boundary.persona_influenced_summary.hint: When enabled, injects the bot persona description during event summary extraction, giving summaries the current bot persona perspective.

persona_influenced_summary.description: Use Current Persona When Summarizing Events
persona_influenced_summary.hint: When enabled, injects the bot persona description during event summary extraction, giving summaries the current bot persona perspective.

boundary.extraction_strategy.hint: LLM partitioning is semantically more accurate but slower. Semantic clustering is faster and can handle interleaved topics.

extraction_strategy.hint: LLM partitioning is semantically more accurate but slower. Semantic clustering is faster and can handle interleaved topics.

boundary.semantic_clustering_eps.hint: Only effective for the Semantic strategy. Lower values produce finer topic splits. Recommended range: 0.4-0.6.

semantic_clustering_eps.hint: Only effective for the Semantic strategy. Lower values produce finer topic splits. Recommended range: 0.4-0.6.

boundary.semantic_clustering_min_samples.hint: Only effective for the Semantic strategy. Minimum messages required for a topic; 2 avoids generating many single-message events.

semantic_clustering_min_samples.hint: Only effective for the Semantic strategy. Minimum messages required for a topic; 2 avoids generating many single-message events.

boundary.tag_normalization_threshold.hint: Vector similarity threshold from 0 to 1. During tag extraction, a tag is merged into an existing tag when similarity exceeds this value.

tag_normalization_threshold.hint: Vector similarity threshold from 0 to 1. During tag extraction, a tag is merged into an existing tag when similarity exceeds this value.

boundary.tag_seeds.hint: Comma-separated words defining the system memory macro categories. The LLM imitates their abstraction level when tagging.

tag_seeds.hint: Comma-separated words defining the system memory macro categories. The LLM imitates their abstraction level when tagging.

boundary.boundary_time_gap_minutes.hint: Automatically closes the current event window and starts a new event when the interval between messages exceeds this value.

boundary_time_gap_minutes.hint: Automatically closes the current event window and starts a new event when the interval between messages exceeds this value.

boundary.boundary_max_messages.hint: Force-closes a single event window when the message count reaches this limit, preventing oversized events.

boundary_max_messages.hint: Force-closes a single event window when the message count reaches this limit, preventing oversized events.

boundary.boundary_max_duration_minutes.hint: Force-closes a single event window when its duration exceeds this value.

boundary_max_duration_minutes.hint: Force-closes a single event window when its duration exceeds this value.

boundary.boundary_topic_drift_enabled.hint: When enabled, detects topic switches by vector cosine distance and dynamically closes events. This is more computationally expensive; disable if conversations feel slow.

boundary_topic_drift_enabled.hint: When enabled, detects topic switches by vector cosine distance and dynamically closes events. This is more computationally expensive; disable if conversations feel slow.

boundary.boundary_topic_drift_threshold.hint: Cosine distance threshold from 0 to 1. Topic switch detection triggers when exceeded. Requires vector retrieval.

boundary_topic_drift_threshold.hint: Cosine distance threshold from 0 to 1. Topic switch detection triggers when exceeded. Requires vector retrieval.

boundary.boundary_topic_drift_min_messag.description: Event Boundary: Minimum Messages for Drift Detection
boundary.boundary_topic_drift_min_messag.hint: Topic drift detection starts only after a single event window reaches this many messages.

boundary_topic_drift_min_messages.description: Event Boundary: Minimum Messages for Drift Detection
boundary_topic_drift_min_messages.hint: Topic drift detection starts only after a single event window reaches this many messages.

boundary.boundary_topic_drift_interval.description: Event Boundary: Topic Drift Detection Step
boundary.boundary_topic_drift_interval.hint: How many messages between topic drift checks. 1 checks every message; 5 checks every five messages. Recommended: 3-10.

boundary_topic_drift_interval.description: Event Boundary: Topic Drift Detection Step
boundary_topic_drift_interval.hint: How many messages between topic drift checks. 1 checks every message; 5 checks every five messages. Recommended: 3-10.

relation.hint: Switches and intervals for social relation inference, persona profile synthesis, and background periodic tasks.

relation.relation_enabled.hint: When disabled, only episodic memory is kept; Impression inference and relationship graph construction are skipped.

relation_enabled.hint: When disabled, only episodic memory is kept; Impression inference and relationship graph construction are skipped.

relation.persona_default_confidence.hint: Initial confidence assigned to new personas, automatically updated after model inference.

persona_default_confidence.hint: Initial confidence assigned to new personas, automatically updated after model inference.

relation.persona_isolation_enabled.hint: When enabled, Impression aggregation uses only events from the same group as evidence. When disabled, events from all groups are mixed.

persona_isolation_enabled.hint: When enabled, Impression aggregation uses only events from the same group as evidence. When disabled, events from all groups are mixed.

relation.impression_event_trigger_enable.description: Enable Event Count Triggered Impression Updates
relation.impression_event_trigger_enable.hint: After each event closes, a rule-based impression update is triggered when participants share enough events. This does not consume LLM tokens.

impression_event_trigger_enabled.description: Enable Event Count Triggered Impression Updates
impression_event_trigger_enabled.hint: After each event closes, a rule-based impression update is triggered when participants share enough events. This does not consume LLM tokens.

relation.impression_event_trigger_thresh.description: Minimum Shared Events for Impression Trigger
relation.impression_event_trigger_thresh.hint: An impression update is triggered only when two people have at least this many shared events in the same scope.

impression_event_trigger_threshold.description: Minimum Shared Events for Impression Trigger
impression_event_trigger_threshold.hint: An impression update is triggered only when two people have at least this many shared events in the same scope.

relation.impression_trigger_debounce_hou.hint: Skip a trigger if the last update was less than this many hours ago, avoiding high-frequency refreshes.

impression_trigger_debounce_hours.hint: Skip a trigger if the last update was less than this many hours ago, avoiding high-frequency refreshes.

relation.impression_update_alpha.hint: Higher values accept new impressions faster; lower values preserve old impressions more strongly. 0.4 means 40% new information and 60% old memory.

impression_update_alpha.hint: Higher values accept new impressions faster; lower values preserve old impressions more strongly. 0.4 means 40% new information and 60% old memory.

relation.decay_enabled.hint: When enabled, event importance decays periodically. When disabled, memories no longer fade over time.

decay_enabled.hint: When enabled, event importance decays periodically. When disabled, memories no longer fade over time.

relation.decay_interval_hours.hint: How many hours between salience time-decay runs over all events. Default is once per day.

decay_interval_hours.hint: How many hours between salience time-decay runs over all events. Default is once per day.

relation.decay_lambda.hint: Sets the salience decay proportion per cycle based on the decay task interval. Default: 0.01 (1%).

decay_lambda.hint: Sets the salience decay proportion per cycle based on the decay task interval. Default: 0.01 (1%).

relation.persona_synthesis_enabled.hint: When enabled, periodically synthesizes user persona profile files (PROFILE.md) from conversation history.

persona_synthesis_enabled.hint: When enabled, periodically synthesizes user persona profile files (PROFILE.md) from conversation history.

relation.persona_synthesis_interval_hour.hint: How many hours between LLM-based user persona profile synthesis runs. Default is once per week.

persona_synthesis_interval_hours.hint: How many hours between LLM-based user persona profile synthesis runs. Default is once per week.

relation.markdown_projection_enabled.hint: When enabled, projects database memories into readable Markdown files. When disabled, WebUI remains available, but .md files are no longer generated under data/.

markdown_projection_enabled.hint: When enabled, projects database memories into readable Markdown files. When disabled, WebUI remains available, but .md files are no longer generated under data/.

relation.impression_aggregation_interval.hint: How many hours between recalculating social orientation (IPC) derived fields and aligning evidence events from latest data. Pure algorithmic task; no LLM tokens consumed.

impression_aggregation_interval_hours.hint: How many hours between recalculating social orientation (IPC) derived fields and aligning evidence events from latest data. Pure algorithmic task; no LLM tokens consumed.

relation.file_watcher_poll_seconds.hint: Polling frequency for detecting user edits to IMPRESSIONS.md. Lower values respond faster but cost more I/O.

file_watcher_poll_seconds.hint: Polling frequency for detecting user edits to IMPRESSIONS.md. Lower values respond faster but cost more I/O.

relation.migration_auto_backup.description: Automatically Back Up Database Before Migration
relation.migration_auto_backup.hint: When pending migration scripts are detected on plugin startup, automatically backs up the database as core.db.bak before running them. When disabled, skips backup.

migration_auto_backup.description: Automatically Back Up Database Before Migration
migration_auto_backup.hint: When pending migration scripts are detected on plugin startup, automatically backs up the database as core.db.bak before running them. When disabled, skips backup.

backup.hint: Periodically back up the database file to prevent data loss.

backup.backup_enabled.hint: When enabled, the database file will be backed up daily.

backup_enabled.hint: When enabled, the database file will be backed up daily.

backup.backup_retention_days.hint: Old backups exceeding this number of days will be automatically deleted.

backup_retention_days.hint: Old backups exceeding this number of days will be automatically deleted.
